They want a plain text record with three key=value lines. Fields: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. They gave these values: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning, blocked_move=do not invent source IDs.

Thus we need to output exactly:

repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Make sure to keep formatting as plain text.

We should not include any extra whitespace or headings. Probably they want exactly these three lines.

Thus final answer: three lines.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
